heroHeadline: Settler Violence Surges Across West Bank as Gaza Aid Remains Severely Restricted
heroSubtitle: Al-Aqsa closed for Eid for first time since 1967; UN warns of ethnic cleansing; 72,135+ Palestinians killed in Gaza war
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, Lancet Global Health, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
